title: Moomoss
body:

[![GitHub Issues or Pull Requests](https://img.shields.io/github/issues/Lemon4ik6484/BetterWalls?logo=github&color=%23e6edf3)](https://github.com/Lemon4ik6484/Moss)
![GeckoLib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23b073c9d274d1e45ae53e9486ccfe98e80d4752.png)


### You can plant any flower on it
**You can plant pink petals on it and it will overgrow with cherry leaves**

![Moomoss with flower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b2befd48f4d68f4f647295a663224ef73439213.png)

### It leaves trail of moss carpets

![Little moomoss with moss carpet trail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd61c1b70c959fb7b1327b042b7601d193cd06b0.png)

### It can be sheared to get moss
**Every grow cycle takes from 3 to 5 minutes!**

<details>
<summary>Overgrown moomoss</summary>

![Overgrown moomoss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/228c90f86fd0ea3f71f9958235fc952fda498d67.png)

</details>

It spawns in lush caves
